arts.ttl: Antonio Conte vows to use Giacomo Raspadori more after key win versus Verona
arts.sum: Napoli manager Antonio Conte wishes to use Giacomo Raspadori more after sealing a win over Verona. Speaking to the press (via Calcio Napoli 24) following Napoli’s 1-0 victory over Verona,…
